---
title: "CV"
description: "Cole Rehbein — crisis counselor, psychology researcher, and writer. Academic and clinical CV."
page-layout: article
code-tools: false
---

::: cli-prompt
<span class="text-terminal-primary">cole@press:~$</span> <code class="text-glow">cat ~/cv.md</code>
:::

::: {.prose-content}

## Cole Rehbein

Crisis Counselor & Psychology Researcher
Albuquerque, New Mexico

---

### Clinical Experience

**Crisis Counselor** — 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
*Friday–Monday, 2:00 PM–11:00 PM MT*

- High-acuity, short-duration crisis intervention
- Modalities: ACT, behavioral activation, functional analysis of verbal behavior
- Populations: crisis callers, SMI, depression, ADHD
- Languages: English, Spanish (B1)

---

### Education

**Master's Program** — Clinical Psychology
*Thesis: Outdoor mindfulness-based behavioral activation for depression*

- Longitudinal design, psychometric analysis
- Tools: R, SPSS, Qualtrics

**B.A., Philosophy** — St. John's College (Great Books Program)

- Focus: Spinoza, ethics, philosophy of mind
- Ancient Greek (reading), French (reading)
- Close reading, Socratic dialogue

---

### Research

**Thesis:** Mindfulness-based behavioral activation for depression

- Data collection: complete
- Analysis: complete
- Writing: in progress

**Methods:** Psychological assessment, EEG, statistical analysis

---

### Journalism

- City reporter, copyeditor, culture writer
- Beats: local politics, food, arts

---

### Technical Skills

- **Languages:** R, Python, LaTeX, Markdown
- **Tools:** Quarto, SPSS, Qualtrics, Git
- **Publishing:** Academic papers, research reports, technical documentation

---

### Contact

cole@cole.press
[GitHub](https://github.com/colerehbein){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

:::
